description: Idempotency key computation fixtures (Level 3 - Verified). Tests determinism and parameter independence.

fixtures.name: idem_deterministic_same_input
fixtures.description: Same input produces same idempotency key

fixtures.name: idem_different_contract_id
fixtures.description: Different contract_id produces different key

fixtures.name: idem_different_action
fixtures.description: Different action produces different key

fixtures.name: idem_different_params
fixtures.description: Different parameters produce different key

fixtures.name: idem_param_order_independence
fixtures.description: Parameter order does not affect idempotency key (canonical JSON)

fixtures.name: idem_empty_params
fixtures.description: Empty parameters are handled consistently

fixtures.name: idem_nested_params
fixtures.description: Nested parameters are included in key computation

fixtures.name: idem_nested_params_different
fixtures.description: Nested parameter changes produce different key

fixtures.name: idem_array_params
fixtures.description: Array parameters are handled consistently

fixtures.name: idem_array_params_order_matters
fixtures.description: Array element order matters for idempotency key

fixtures.name: idem_null_values
fixtures.description: Null values are handled consistently

fixtures.name: idem_boolean_true
fixtures.description: Boolean true is handled consistently

fixtures.name: idem_boolean_false
fixtures.description: Boolean false is handled consistently

fixtures.name: idem_boolean_different
fixtures.description: Different boolean values produce different keys

fixtures.name: idem_number_integer
fixtures.description: Integer number parameters are handled consistently

fixtures.name: idem_number_float
fixtures.description: Float number parameters are handled consistently

fixtures.name: idem_number_precision
fixtures.description: Number precision differences produce different keys

fixtures.name: idem_string_case_sensitive
fixtures.description: String parameters are case-sensitive

fixtures.name: idem_string_whitespace
fixtures.description: Whitespace in strings matters for idempotency

fixtures.name: idem_large_params
fixtures.description: Large parameter sets are handled consistently

fixtures.name: idem_unicode_params
fixtures.description: Unicode characters in parameters are handled consistently
